summary: Iteration 39 - Admin Royalty Import Feature (moved from Label Dashboard to Admin Dashboard). All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning about <span> inside <option> element - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/royalties/import requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/royalties/imports requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/royalties/imports/{import_id} requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/royalties/entries/{entry_id}/assign requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/royalties/users requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Non-admin user cannot access POST /api/admin/royalties/import (403)
Backend: Non-admin user cannot access GET /api/admin/royalties/imports (403)
Backend: Non-admin user cannot access GET /api/admin/royalties/users (403)
Backend: Admin can import CSV and it matches against ALL platform users
Backend: Admin list imports returns imports array with expected fields
Backend: Admin get import detail returns import object and entries array
Backend: Admin get import detail returns 404 for non-existent import
Backend: Admin get all users returns 53 platform users for assignment dropdown
Backend: Admin can assign unmatched entry to any platform user
Backend: Admin assign entry returns 404 for non-existent entry
Backend: Admin import fails without Artist column (400)
Backend: Admin import fails without file (400/422)
Backend: Label Dashboard export CSV still works (200)
Backend: Label Dashboard export PDF still works (200)
Backend: Label Dashboard royalties endpoint exists (200)
Frontend: Admin sidebar has 'Royalty Import' nav link pointing to /admin/royalty-import
Frontend: Admin Royalty Import page renders at /admin/royalty-import
Frontend: Admin page has CSV dropzone with drag-and-drop functionality
Frontend: Admin page has import history section with 12 imports
Frontend: Import detail modal opens and shows matched/unmatched entries
Frontend: Import detail modal shows summary stats (Total, Matched, Unmatched, Revenue)
Frontend: Unmatched entries have 'Assign' button in modal
Frontend: Assignment dropdown shows all 53 platform users
Frontend: Modal closes correctly with X button
Frontend: Label Dashboard has 3 tabs (Overview, Royalty Splits, Payouts)
Frontend: Label Dashboard Payouts tab has export section with CSV/PDF buttons
Frontend: Label Dashboard Payouts tab has payout summary table
Frontend: Label Dashboard Payouts tab does NOT have import section (as expected)
critical_code_review_comments: Admin royalty import correctly matches against ALL platform users (49+ users), not just a label's roster
Admin endpoints properly require admin role (403 for non-admin users)
Label Dashboard Payouts tab correctly has ONLY export functionality (CSV/PDF) - no import section
Import detail modal shows matched/unmatched entries with assignment dropdown for unmatched
Assignment dropdown correctly shows all platform users for admin to assign to
Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in assignment dropdown - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: Multiple test imports created during testing (admin_test_import.csv, detail_test.csv, assign_test.csv)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 tested Admin Royalty Import feature (moved from Label Dashboard to Admin Dashboard). Admin endpoints: POST /api/admin/royalties/import (uploads CSV, matches against ALL platform users), GET /api/admin/royalties/imports (lists all imports), GET /api/admin/royalties/imports/{import_id} (shows entries), PUT /api/admin/royalties/entries/{entry_id}/assign (assigns unmatched entry to any user), GET /api/admin/royalties/users (returns all 53 platform users for dropdown). Admin page at /admin/royalty-import has upload zone, import history, and detail modal with assignment flow. Label Dashboard at /label Payouts tab now ONLY has export buttons (CSV/PDF) and payout summary - NO import section.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

POST /api/admin/royalties/import.input: CSV file with Artist column (required), optional: Track, Platform, Country, Streams, Revenue, Period
features: Fuzzy matches artists to ALL platform users
Sends email notifications to matched artists

GET /api/admin/royalties/imports.returns: Array of imports with id, filename, total_rows, matched, unmatched, total_revenue, created_at

returns: entries array with id, artist_name_raw, matched_artist_id, matched_artist_name, track, platform, country, streams, revenue, period, status

PUT /api/admin/royalties/entries/{entry_.action: Assigns unmatched entry to specified artist (any platform user), updates status to 'matched', updates import stats

GET /api/admin/royalties/users.returns: Array of all platform users (53 users) with id, artist_name, name, email

label_dashboard_payouts_tab.payout_summary: Table showing Artist, Gross Revenue, Split, Artist Payout, Label Earnings
label_dashboard_payouts_tab.import_section: REMOVED - Import functionality moved to Admin Dashboard only

admin_royalty_import_ui.nav_link: Admin sidebar has 'Royalty Import' nav item
import_detail_modal: Entries table with Status, Artist (Raw), Matched To, Track, Platform, Streams, Revenue, Action
Assignment dropdown with all 53 platform users
